name: HubSpot
description: HubSpot CRM integration for managing contacts, companies, deals, and support tickets with advanced pipeline analytics and UTC date handling

get_contact.description: Retrieve a HubSpot contact by email address using CRM v3 API. Supports custom properties.

email.description: Email address of the contact to retrieve

properties.description: Optional list of specific properties to retrieve (including custom properties). If not provided, returns standard properties (email, firstname, lastname, phone, company, jobtitle).

contact.description: HubSpot contact record from CRM v3 API

properties.description: Contact properties

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when contact was created

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when contact was last updated

error.description: Error message if contact not found

get_contact_notes.description: Retrieve notes associated with a HubSpot contact using CRM search API

contact_id.description: The internal object ID of the contact to retrieve notes for

limit.description: Maximum number of notes to retrieve (default: 100, max: 200)

properties.description: List of note properties to retrieve (default: hs_note_body, hs_timestamp, hubspot_owner_id, hs_createdate, hs_lastmodifieddate)

contact_id.description: The contact ID that notes were retrieved for

error.description: Error message if note retrieval failed

create_note.description: Create a new note and associate it with a contact, company, or deal in HubSpot

note_body.description: The body content of the note

contact_id.description: The contact ID to associate the note with (optional)

company_id.description: The company ID to associate the note with (optional)

deal_id.description: The deal ID to associate the note with (optional)

timestamp.description: Custom timestamp in milliseconds (optional, defaults to current time)

success.description: Whether the note was created successfully

update_note.description: Update an existing note in HubSpot

note_id.description: The ID of the note to update

note_body.description: The new body content for the note (optional)

success.description: Whether the note was updated successfully

note_id.description: The ID of the note to delete

success.description: Whether the note was deleted successfully

note_id.description: The ID of the note that was deleted

get_contact_emails.description: Retrieve recent email conversations for a HubSpot contact using v4 associations API

contact_id.description: The internal object ID of the contact to retrieve emails for

email_limit.description: Maximum number of recent emails to retrieve (default: 5, max: 20)

contact_id.description: The contact ID that emails were retrieved for

recent_emails.description: Recent email communications associated with the contact

email_limit_applied.description: The limit that was applied for email retrieval

error.description: Error message if email fetching failed

create_contact.description: Create a new contact in HubSpot CRM using v3 API

properties.description: Contact properties - must include at least email, firstname, or lastname

additional_properties.description: Additional custom properties to set on the contact (e.g., custom_field_id, department, lead_source, etc.).

contact.description: Created contact record from HubSpot CRM v3 API with all properties

properties.description: All contact properties as stored in HubSpot

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when contact was created

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when contact was last updated

archived.description: Whether the contact is archived (always false for new contacts)

created_properties.description: The specific properties that were set when creating this contact

update_contact.description: Update an existing contact in HubSpot using CRM v3 API

contact_id.description: The internal object ID of the contact to update

properties.description: Contact properties to update

additional_properties.description: Additional custom properties to update on the contact (e.g., custom_field_id, department, lead_source, etc.).

contact.description: Updated contact record from HubSpot CRM v3 API with all current properties

properties.description: All current contact properties after update, including the updated values

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when contact was created

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when contact was last updated (reflects this update)

updated_properties.description: The specific properties that were updated in this request

search_contacts.description: Search for contacts in HubSpot using CRM v3 search API

query.description: Search query string to match contact properties

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return

after.description: Pagination cursor token from previous response to get next page of results

results.description: Array of contacts matching the search query

properties.description: Contact properties

total.description: Number of contacts in this response

paging.description: Pagination information for getting additional results

after.description: Token to use for next page of results

add_contact_to_list.description: Add a contact to a HubSpot list using Lists API

list_id.description: The ID of the HubSpot list to add the contact to

contact_id.description: The HubSpot contact ID (internal object ID)

result.description: Result of adding contact to list operation

get_recent_contacts.description: Retrieve recently created contacts from HubSpot using CRM v3 API, sorted by creation date

limit.description: Number of contacts to retrieve

recent_contacts.description: HubSpot CRM v3 API response with recent contacts

properties.description: Contact properties

get_recent_tickets.description: Retrieve recent support tickets from HubSpot using CRM v3 API with filtering and sorting

limit.description: Number of tickets to retrieve

status.description: Filter tickets by pipeline stage/status (use the stage ID from your HubSpot ticket pipeline)

sort_property.description: Property to sort tickets by (e.g., hs_lastmodifieddate, createdate, subject, hs_pipeline_stage, or any ticket property)

tickets.description: HubSpot CRM v3 API response with recent tickets

properties.description: Ticket properties

createdAt.description: ISO timestamp when ticket was created

updatedAt.description: ISO timestamp when ticket was last updated

get_ticket_conversation.description: Retrieve the conversation thread associated with a ticket.

ticket_id.description: The ID of the thread to retrieve conversation for.

conversation.description: The conversation thread for the ticket.

add_ticket_comment.description: Add a comment to an existing HubSpot ticket.

ticket_id.description: The ID of the ticket to add a comment to.

comment.description: The comment text to add to the ticket.

is_public.description: Whether the comment should be visible to the customer (default: false).

result.description: Result of adding the comment to the ticket.

get_company_notes.description: Retrieve notes associated with a HubSpot company using CRM search API

company_id.description: The internal object ID of the company to retrieve notes for

limit.description: Maximum number of notes to retrieve (default: 100, max: 200)

properties.description: List of note properties to retrieve (default: hs_note_body, hs_timestamp, hubspot_owner_id, hs_createdate, hs_lastmodifieddate)

company_id.description: The company ID that notes were retrieved for

error.description: Error message if note retrieval failed

get_company.description: Retrieve a specific company from HubSpot by ID using CRM v3 API. Supports custom properties.

company_id.description: The internal object ID of the company to retrieve

properties.description: List of specific company properties to retrieve (including custom properties). If not provided, returns standard properties. Use get_company_properties to discover available custom properties.

company.description: HubSpot company record from CRM v3 API

properties.description: Company properties including custom fields

create_company.description: Create a new company in HubSpot using CRM v3 API

properties.description: Company properties - at least one property is required

company.description: Created company record from HubSpot CRM v3 API

properties.description: Company properties as stored in HubSpot

archived.description: Whether the company is archived (always false for new companies)

update_company.description: Update an existing company in HubSpot.

properties.description: Company properties to update.

search_companies.description: Search for companies in HubSpot by query.

limit.description: Number of results to return (default: 100).

search_companies_by_owner_name.description: Search for companies in HubSpot by owner name. First looks up the owner ID by name from the Owners API, then retrieves all companies associated with that owner.

owner_name.description: Name of the HubSpot owner to search for (first name, last name, or full name). Matching is case-insensitive.

limit.description: Maximum number of companies to return (default: 100, max: 100)

properties.description: List of company properties to retrieve. If not provided, returns standard properties including name, domain, phone, city, state, country, industry, numberofemployees, annualrevenue, and hubspot_owner_id.

owner.description: Information about the matched owner (null if not found)

companies.description: Array of companies associated with the owner

properties.description: Company properties including custom fields

total.description: Total number of companies found for this owner

paging.description: Pagination information if there are more results available (null if no more pages)

after.description: Token to retrieve the next page of results

error.description: Error message if the search failed (null if successful)

available_owners.description: List of all available owners in HubSpot (only returned when owner is not found, null otherwise)

get_company_properties.description: Retrieve all available company properties (including custom) from HubSpot with detailed metadata.

include_details.description: Include full property details (label, type, fieldType, options) instead of just names (default: false)

properties.description: List of company properties. Returns property name strings by default, or detailed objects when include_details is true.

oneOf.description: Detailed property metadata (when include_details is true)

hubspotDefined.description: Whether it's a default HubSpot property

get_deal_properties.description: Retrieve all available deal properties (including custom) from HubSpot with detailed metadata.

include_details.description: Include full property details (label, type, fieldType, options) instead of just names (default: false)

properties.description: List of deal properties with optional detailed metadata

get_contact_properties.description: Retrieve all available contact properties (including custom) from HubSpot with detailed metadata.

include_details.description: Include full property details (label, type, fieldType, options) instead of just names (default: false)

properties.description: List of contact properties with optional detailed metadata

get_deal_notes.description: Retrieve notes associated with a HubSpot deal using CRM search API

deal_id.description: The internal object ID of the deal to retrieve notes for

limit.description: Maximum number of notes to retrieve (default: 100, max: 200)

properties.description: List of note properties to retrieve (default: hs_note_body, hs_timestamp, hubspot_owner_id, hs_createdate, hs_lastmodifieddate)

deal_id.description: The deal ID that notes were retrieved for

error.description: Error message if note retrieval failed

get_deal.description: Retrieve a specific deal by its ID with detailed properties and UTC dates. Supports custom properties.

deal_id.description: The internal object ID of the deal to retrieve

properties.description: Optional list of specific properties to retrieve (including custom properties). If not provided, returns standard properties. To get custom properties, first use get_deal_properties to discover available property names.

deal.description: HubSpot deal record from CRM v3 API with UTC dates

properties.description: Deal properties with last contacted and activity information

create_deal.description: Create a new deal in HubSpot using CRM v3 API with optional associations

properties.description: Deal properties - dealstage and pipeline are recommended

dealstage.description: Deal stage ID (recommended for accounts with multiple pipelines)

pipeline.description: Pipeline ID (recommended for accounts with multiple pipelines)

associations.description: Optional associations to contacts, companies, or other CRM objects

id.description: ID of the object to associate with

deal.description: Created deal record from HubSpot CRM v3 API

properties.description: Deal properties as stored in HubSpot

archived.description: Whether the deal is archived (always false for new deals)

update_deal.description: Update an existing deal in HubSpot.

deal_id.description: The ID of the deal to update.

properties.description: Deal properties to update.

search_deals.description: Search for deals using advanced filters and text queries with comprehensive pagination and UTC handling. Supports custom properties.

query.description: Text query to search deal names

limit.description: Number of results to return per page

deal_stage.description: Filter deals by specific deal stage ID

close_date_start.description: Filter deals with close date >= this date (supports multiple formats: YYYY-MM-DD, DD MMM YYYY, etc.)

close_date_end.description: Filter deals with close date <= this date (supports multiple formats: YYYY-MM-DD, DD MMM YYYY, etc.)

min_amount.description: Filter deals with amount >= this value

max_amount.description: Filter deals with amount <= this value

pipeline_id.description: Filter deals by specific pipeline ID

properties.description: Optional list of specific properties to retrieve (including custom properties). If not provided, returns standard properties.

results.description: Array of deals matching search criteria with UTC dates

properties.description: Deal properties including last contacted information

pagination.description: Pagination metadata with clear guidance for getting more search results

has_more_pages.description: TRUE if there are more search results available

current_page_size.description: Number of deals in this search response

pagination_instructions.description: Instructions for retrieving additional search results

suggested_params_for_more.description: Recommended parameters to get more comprehensive search results

get_recent_deals.description: Retrieve recently created or modified deals from HubSpot with UTC dates

limit.description: Number of deals to retrieve (default: 100).

get_deals.description: Retrieve deals from HubSpot with comprehensive pagination, filtering, and optional rate limiting for large datasets with UTC date handling

limit.description: Number of deals to retrieve per page

fetch_all.description: Whether to fetch all available pages of results. If false (default), automatically paginates to reach the requested limit. If true, fetches all deals regardless of limit.

pipeline_id.description: Filter deals by specific pipeline ID

year.description: Filter deals by close date year (for performance optimization)

max_total.description: Maximum total deals to retrieve across all pages

delay_between_requests.description: Optional delay in seconds between requests to avoid rate limits (default: 0, no delay)

start_date.description: Filter deals with date >= this date (YYYY-MM-DD format, e.g., '2024-01-01')

end_date.description: Filter deals with date <= this date (YYYY-MM-DD format, e.g., '2024-09-01')

date_field.description: Which date field to use for filtering (default: 'hs_lastmodifieddate')

properties.description: Optional list of specific properties to retrieve (including custom properties). If not provided, returns standard properties. Use get_deal_properties to discover available custom properties.

results.description: Array of deals with UTC dates and last contacted information

properties.description: Deal properties with enhanced last contacted fields

pagination.description: Comprehensive pagination metadata with clear instructions

fetched_all_available.description: Whether all available deals were fetched

has_more_pages.description: TRUE if there are more pages of results available

current_page_size.description: Number of deals in this response

pagination_instructions.description: Human-readable instructions for getting more results

next_page_params.description: Exact parameters to use for the next page request

get_deal_pipelines.description: Retrieve all deal pipelines and their stages from HubSpot.

pipelines.description: List of all deal pipelines and their stages.

get_lists.description: Retrieve all available lists/segments from HubSpot with filtering options

include_filters.description: Include filter definitions for dynamic lists

get_list.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific list by ID

list_id.description: The ILS list ID to retrieve

search_lists.description: Search for lists by name and other criteria with pagination

get_list_members.description: Retrieve list members with complete contact information including names, emails, and custom properties

list_id.description: The ILS list ID to get members from

limit.description: Maximum number of members to return

contact_properties.description: Contact properties to include in response

include_membership_timestamps.description: Include when contacts were added to list

members.description: Array of list members with contact details

membership_timestamp.description: When contact was added to list

properties.description: All requested contact properties

get_list_memberships.description: Get raw list member IDs and timestamps without contact details (for advanced use cases)

limit.description: Maximum number of memberships to return

membershipTimestamp.description: When record was added to list

get_contact_associations.description: Retrieve all associated objects for a contact (companies, deals, tickets, etc.) using v4 Associations API

contact_id.description: The internal object ID of the contact to retrieve associations for

association_types.description: List of association types to retrieve. If not provided, retrieves all common types.

limit.description: Maximum number of associations to retrieve per type (default: 100, max: 500)

contact_id.description: The contact ID that associations were retrieved for

associations.description: All associations grouped by object type

associationTypes.description: Association type details (Primary, Custom labels, etc.)

total_associations.description: Total number of associations found across all types

get_company_associations.description: Retrieve all associated objects for a company (contacts, deals, tickets, etc.) using v4 Associations API

company_id.description: The internal object ID of the company to retrieve associations for

association_types.description: List of association types to retrieve. If not provided, retrieves all common types.

limit.description: Maximum number of associations to retrieve per type (default: 100, max: 500)

company_id.description: The company ID that associations were retrieved for

associations.description: All associations grouped by object type

total_associations.description: Total number of associations found across all types

get_deal_associations.description: Retrieve all associated objects for a deal (contacts, companies, tickets, etc.) using v4 Associations API

deal_id.description: The internal object ID of the deal to retrieve associations for

association_types.description: List of association types to retrieve. If not provided, retrieves all common types.

limit.description: Maximum number of associations to retrieve per type (default: 100, max: 500)

deal_id.description: The deal ID that associations were retrieved for

associations.description: All associations grouped by object type

total_associations.description: Total number of associations found across all types

get_owner.description: Retrieve a HubSpot owner by their ID. Returns owner details including name, email, and team information.

owner_id.description: The ID of the owner to retrieve

primary.description: Whether this is the primary team

error.description: Error message if owner retrieval failed

get_marketing_emails.description: List marketing emails from HubSpot. Supports filtering by name, status, and date range.

limit.description: Maximum number of emails to return (default: 50, max: 100)

after.description: Pagination cursor for fetching next page of results

get_campaigns.description: List marketing campaigns from HubSpot. Returns campaign details including name, status, dates, and notes.

limit.description: Maximum number of campaigns to return (default: 50, max: 100)

after.description: Pagination cursor for fetching next page of results

name.description: Filter campaigns by name (partial match on hs_name property)

sort.description: Sort order for results. Prefix with - for descending order.

get_campaign.description: Retrieve a single campaign by ID with optional metrics for a date range.

campaign_id.description: The ID of the campaign to retrieve

start_date.description: Start date for metrics (YYYY-MM-DD format). If provided with end_date, returns campaign metrics.

end_date.description: End date for metrics (YYYY-MM-DD format). Required if start_date is provided.

metrics.description: Campaign metrics for the specified date range (only if dates provided)

error.description: Error message if campaign retrieval failed

get_campaign_assets.description: Retrieve assets (landing pages, emails, forms, blog posts) associated with a campaign, including performance metrics.

limit.description: Maximum number of assets to return (default: 50, max: 100)

get_campaign_performance.description: Get comprehensive performance report for a campaign including all asset types, aggregated metrics, website traffic, and contact lifecycle data.

total_assets.description: Total number of assets across all types

landing_page_metrics.description: Aggregated landing page metrics (views, submissions, contacts)

email_metrics.description: Aggregated email metrics (sent, opens, clicks, etc.)

error.description: Error message if performance retrieval failed

get_contact_calls_and_meetings.description: Retrieve calls and meetings (with transcripts) associated with a HubSpot contact

contact_id.description: The internal object ID of the contact

limit.description: Max calls/meetings to retrieve each (default: 50, max: 100)

calls.description: Calls with transcript utterances (Google Meet transcripts are stored on call records)

hs_call_transcription_id.description: Transcript ID (may be null due to known HubSpot bug even when transcript exists)

transcript.description: Transcript utterances from the HubSpot Calling Transcripts API. Each item contains speakerId, text, and timestamp.

meetings.description: Meetings with metadata (title, time, location). Transcript content is on call records, not meetings.

get_deal_calls_and_meetings.description: Retrieve calls and meetings (with transcripts) associated with a HubSpot deal

deal_id.description: The internal object ID of the deal

limit.description: Max calls/meetings to retrieve each (default: 50, max: 100)

calls.description: Calls with transcript utterances (Google Meet transcripts are stored on call records)

hs_call_transcription_id.description: Transcript ID (may be null due to known HubSpot bug even when transcript exists)

transcript.description: Transcript utterances from the HubSpot Calling Transcripts API. Each item contains speakerId, text, and timestamp.

meetings.description: Meetings with metadata (title, time, location). Transcript content is on call records, not meetings.

get_call_transcript.description: Retrieve structured transcript utterances (with speaker IDs and timestamps) for a HubSpot call. Use this to get the full speaker breakdown of a call transcript. The transcript_id can be found in hs_call_transcription_id on the call record, or use the call record ID directly if hs_call_has_transcript is true.

transcript_id.description: The transcript ID (hs_call_transcription_id from the call record, or the call record ID as a fallback)

utterances.description: Structured transcript utterances with speaker info and timestamps

startTimeMillis.description: Start time in milliseconds from start of call

endTimeMillis.description: End time in milliseconds from start of call

total_utterances.description: Number of utterances in the transcript
